plugins.name: meeting-ops
plugins.description: Meeting preparation, calendar scanning, and structured debriefs. Encodes Atlas's meeting methodology.

plugins.name: inbox-zero
plugins.description: Daily inbox management — triage, escalation detection, follow-up cadences, voice-matched drafts, and SOD/EOD reporting.

plugins.name: compounding-learning
plugins.description: Capture skills, insights, patterns, and corrections during work — never solve the same problem twice.

plugins.name: presentation-builder
plugins.description: Build polished, self-contained HTML slide deck presentations with navigation, branded styling, and multiple slide types.

plugins.name: proactive-actions
plugins.description: After meeting debriefs, classify and execute action items autonomously — execute, draft, chase, or escalate.

plugins.name: travel-prep
plugins.description: Proactive travel preparation for executive travelers — onboarding, pre-trip briefings, and day-of support.

plugins.name: daily-reporting
plugins.description: Executive daily reporting — start-of-day planning and end-of-day closeout with continuity handoff, review/locking, and connector-agnostic source handling.

plugins.name: conference-contact-capture
plugins.description: Capture contacts met at conferences, research them on LinkedIn, and draft personalised follow-up emails in the executive's voice.

plugins.name: expense-management
plugins.description: Monthly expense reporting and subscription audits via Composio-connected bookkeeping systems.

plugins.name: ideal-week-ops
plugins.description: Extract an executive's ideal week from conversation, then scan their calendar to enforce it.

plugins.name: energy-audit
plugins.description: Bi-weekly energy audit — reads the trailing 14 days across calendar, tasks, meetings, and Slack, applies automation-readiness criteria filtered through an exec's energy profile, and produces 1-2 automation plans per cycle.

plugins.name: meeting-performance-analyzer
plugins.description: Weekly meeting performance brief — scores meetings on quality dimensions, applies the Atlas Meeting Worth Matrix to recurring meetings, and produces a tight brief with leadership reflection and time-reclaimable recommendations.
